zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhiryd ap Bleddyn於大約1049年出生時，他的父親Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys25歲，母親Haer Verch Cyllyn26歲。他和Afandrech Verch Collwyn至少有1個兒子。他於1087年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1088年在英國威爾斯波斯享年41歲。

zh-hans.Powis Castle, Welshpool, Montgomery, Wal: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾維爾申普爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhiryd ap Bleddyn于大约1049年出生时，他的父亲Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys25岁，母亲Haer Verch Cyllyn26岁。他和Afandrech Verch Collwyn至少有1个儿子。他于1087年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1088年在英国威尔斯波斯享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhiryd ap Bleddyn was born about 1049, his father, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, was 25 and his mother, Haer Verch Cyllyn, was 26. He had at least 1 son with Afandrech Verch Collwyn. He registered for military service in 1087. He died about 1088, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhiryd ap Bleddyn est né environ 1049, son père, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Haer Verch Cyllyn, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Afandrech Verch Collwyn. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1087. Il est décédé environ 1088, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhiryd ap Bleddyn um 1049 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys 25 und seine Mutter Haer Verch Cyllyn 26. Er hatte mit Afandrech Verch Collwyn mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1087 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1088 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

ht.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhiryd ap Bleddyn è nato il circa 1049, il suo padre, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Haer Verch Cyllyn, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Afandrech Verch Collwyn. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1087. Morì circa 1088, nel Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhiryd ap Bleddynが約1049年に生まれた時，父Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powysは25歳，母Haer Verch Cyllynは26歳であった。彼はAfandrech Verch Collwynとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1087年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1088年にイギリスウェールズポウイスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhiryd ap Bleddyn(이)가 대략 1049년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Haer Verch Cyllyn(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Afandrech Verch Collwyn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1087년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1088년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1049–about 1088: tany ho any amin'ny 1049–tany ho any amin'ny 1088
mg.Powys, Wales: Powys, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhiryd ap Bleddyn nasceu aproximadamente 1049, seu pai, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Haer Verch Cyllyn, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Afandrech Verch Collwyn. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1087. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1088, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhiryd ap Bleddyn родился около 1049 г., его отцу по имени Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Haer Verch Cyllyn, 26. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Afandrech Verch Collwyn. В 1087 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1088 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

sm.about 1049–about 1088: e tusa o le 1049–e tusa o le 1088

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhiryd ap Bleddyn nació aproximadamente 1049, su papá, Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Haer Verch Cyllyn, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Afandrech Verch Collwyn. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1087. Murió aproximadamente 1088, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
